observations.archetype_gloss: Embodiment of decay and internal collapse
observations.summary: Aviel is depicted in a state of intense psychological and physical distress, symbolizing the Shadow archetype as he confronts his inner decay and the collapse of his former self.

evidence.quote: Inside, Aviel sat bolt upright on his cot, eyes wide and wild, chest heaving as if he'd just run a great distance. His hair—what remained of it—stuck up in wild, greasy tufts. His nightclothes were soaked with sweat. And his hands, Dan noticed, were clenched into fists so tight the knuckles had gone white.
